name: Insight Inc.
summary: Insight Inc. engages in planning and providing advertising and sales promotion services for the housing and real estate, entertainment, information technology and service, and distribution and retail industries. The company also publishes information magazines; provides event and public relations planning services for local government and public organizations; and undertakes market research analysis and customer satisfaction surveys, as well as manages marketing research sites. Insight Inc. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
